_meta.description: Minimal context profiles for claude -p worker invocations by task type
_meta.notes: CLAUDE.md auto-loads for all claude -p calls from repo root. These profiles define ADDITIONAL context_files per task type. Goal: load only what's needed to reduce token waste.

security-review.description: Security audit or code review tasks

synthesis.description: Signal synthesis, learning capture, steering rule updates
synthesis.notes: Signal directory scan -- token cost scales with signal count

code-improvement.description: Refactoring, test writing, lint fixes, quality improvements
code-improvement.notes: Task-specific context_files in backlog.jsonl point to target files

research-analysis.description: Research briefs, architecture reviews, first-principles analysis

prd-creation.description: PRD writing, project scoping, task decomposition
